headline: Is It Too Late To Consider FedEx (FDX) After An 82% One Year Rally?
summary: For investors wondering whether FedEx at around US$370 a share still offers value or if most of the easy gains are already behind it, this article walks through what the numbers say about the stock. The share price recently closed at US$370.14, with returns of 3.7% over 7 days, 5.2% over 30 days, 26.3% year to date and 82.5% over the last year. This naturally raises questions about how much value is now priced in. Those moves are drawing fresh attention to FedEx's role in global logistics...
